zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis於大約1549年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾格倫加利時，她的父親Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry36歲，母親Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan32歲。她於1561年與Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes在英國蘇格蘭希倫德格倫 蓋瑞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1620年在蘇格蘭Forfarshire吉利姆爾享年72歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis于大约1549年出生在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾格倫加利时，她的父亲Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry36岁，母亲Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan32岁。她于1561年与Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes在英国苏格兰希倫德格倫 蓋瑞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1620年在苏格兰Forfarshire吉利姆爾享年72岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis was born about 1549, in Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry, was 36 and her mother, Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan, was 32. She married Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes in 1561, in Glen Garry, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1620, in Kirriemuir, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis est née environ 1549, à Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes en 1561, à Glen Garry, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1620, à Kirriemuir, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1561 in Glen Garry, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1620 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Kirriemuir, Forfarshire, Scotland und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewisが約1549年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアグレンガーリーで生まれた時，父Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarryは36歳，母Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunveganは32歳であった。1561年にイギリススコットランドヒグhランドグレン ガーリーでSir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1620年にスコットランドForfarshireキリームイルで72歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Strome Castle, Loch Catton, Cromarty & R: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 스트롬
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis(이)가 대략 1549년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 글렌가리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1561년 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 글렌 게리에서 Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1620년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 커리무이르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis nasceu aproximadamente 1549, em Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes em 1561, em Glen Garry, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1620, em Kirriemuir, Forfarshire, Scotland, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Strome Castle, Loch Catton, Cromarty & R: стром, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis родилась около 1549 г. в местности гленгарри, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes в 1561 г. в местности глен гарри, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1620 г. в местности кирриемуир, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis nació aproximadamente 1549, en Glengarry, Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Angus MacAllister MacDonald 7th of Glengarry, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Catherine MacLeod of Dunvegan, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes en 1561, en Glen Garry, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1620, en Kirriemuir, Forfarshire, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Escocia, Reino Unido.
